label: ShipBob
description: Connect to ShipBob to sync orders, inventory, and shipments from your 3PL fulfillment warehouse.

form.title: Connect ShipBob
form.subtitle: Paste your ShipBob personal access token to sync fulfillment, inventory, and shipping data.

methods.label: Personal Access Token
methods.description: Generate a token from the ShipBob merchant dashboard under Integrations → API and paste it here. No OAuth setup required — the simplest path.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a ShipBob Personal Access Token

1. Log in to [web.shipbob.com](https://web.shipbob.com).
2. Click your account name or avatar in the top-right corner, then go to **Integrations**.
3. Select **API** from the left sidebar (or navigate directly to **Integrations → API**).
4. Click **Generate Token**. Give it a descriptive name like `Anton`.
5. Copy the token shown — it is displayed **only once**. If you lose it, generate a new one.
6. Paste the token into the **Personal Access Token** field below.

## Notes

- Tokens are tied to your ShipBob merchant account. If you have multiple channels or stores, make sure you're logged into the right account before generating.
- To revoke access, return to **Integrations → API** and delete the token.
- See [ShipBob's API documentation](https://developer.shipbob.com) for details on available endpoints and rate limits.

fields.name: personal_access_token
fields.label: Personal Access Token
fields.description: Found at web.shipbob.com → Integrations → API. The token is shown only once at creation time.

fields.name: channel_id
fields.label: Channel ID (optional)
fields.description: If your ShipBob account has multiple sales channels, enter the numeric channel ID to scope requests. Leave blank to use the default channel.
